title: Agentic Workspace local chat checkpoint
description: Ignored local-only continuity checkpoint used to rehydrate a chat after compaction or resume without treating local notes as closure evidence.

created_at.description: ISO-like UTC timestamp for the first checkpoint write.

updated_at.description: ISO-like UTC timestamp for the most recent checkpoint write.

task.description: Short current task summary suitable for startup projection.

branch.description: Current git branch at checkpoint write time.

current_pr.description: Current pull request number or URL when known.

items.description: One issue reference associated with the current task.

current_issue_refs.description: Issue references associated with the current task.

items.description: One durable source to reread before trusting local checkpoint state.

durable_sources.description: Durable sources that should be reread on resume.

resume_rule.description: Human-readable rule reminding agents that local checkpoints are advisory and durable sources remain authoritative.

items.description: One recently run proof command or receipt summary.

last_proof.description: Recently run proof commands or receipt summaries.

items.description: One unresolved blocker to re-check after resume.

open_blockers.description: Unresolved blockers to re-check after resume.

dirty_state_summary.description: Short summary of local dirty state at checkpoint write time.

next_safe_command.description: Next safe command to run after resume.

volatile_observations.description: Stale-prone local or remote observations captured with provenance and observation time.

repo_root.description: Repository root path observed when the checkpoint was written.

remote_origin_url.description: Origin remote URL observed when available.

branch.description: Git branch observed when the checkpoint was written.

head_commit.description: Local HEAD commit observed when the checkpoint was written.

upstream_commit.description: Upstream commit observed when available; compare with local HEAD on resume.

current_pr.description: Pull request number or URL observed when known.

current_issue_refs.description: Issue references associated with the checkpoint task.

dirty_state_summary.description: Local dirty-state summary observed or preserved at checkpoint write.

remote_comments.description: Marker that remote PR/issue comments were not fetched by checkpoint write.

ci_state.description: Marker that CI state was not fetched by checkpoint write.

dependency_state.description: Marker that dependency release/availability state was not fetched by checkpoint write.

local_notes.description: Advisory local notes copied from the checkpoint write inputs.

task.description: Advisory task summary recorded for resume orientation.

next_safe_command.description: Advisory next command from the checkpoint writer.

open_blockers.description: Local blocker notes to re-check after resume.

source.description: Where these local notes came from.

observed_at.description: Timestamp when these local notes were observed.

proof_state.description: Proof history plus explicit invalidation conditions; not current completion evidence.

status.description: Whether proof history was recorded in this local checkpoint.

last_proof.description: Recently run proof commands or summaries recorded as history.

items.description: One historical proof command or summary.

source.description: Where the proof history came from.

observed_at.description: Timestamp when the proof history was recorded.

valid_until_change.description: Change classes that invalidate treating recorded proof as current.

stale_if.description: Concrete stale conditions that require proof re-check.

rule.description: Rule preventing checkpoint proof history from becoming completion evidence.

resume_checklist.description: Action-shaped checklist for the next agent before trusting checkpoint state.

final_response_admission.description: Ignored host final-response admission resume slices. Advisory only; not closure evidence.

limits.description: Invariant flags that make the local-only and non-evidence limits explicit.

local_only.description: Checkpoint is only for the local workspace.

gitignored.description: Checkpoint must remain in an ignored local path.

not_closure_evidence.description: Checkpoint cannot prove issue or pull request closure.

no_raw_transcripts.description: Checkpoint must not store raw chat transcript content.

no_secrets.description: Checkpoint must not store secrets or authentication material.

durable_decisions_require_durable_source.description: Durable decisions must be backed by durable sources outside this checkpoint.

observation.description: A stale-prone observation with source and observation time.

observed_at.description: Timestamp when the value was observed.
